inputs.prompt: A scene of urban fantasy art. A dynamic graffiti art character. A teenager, painted with spray paint, comes to life from a concrete wall. He raps at breakneck speed in an English rap while striking a classic, energetic rapper pose. The scene is set at night under a quaint urban railway bridge. Light comes from a lone streetlamp, creating a cinematic atmosphere, full of high energy and stunning detail. The audio of the video consists entirely of his rap, with no other dialogue or background noise.
